title: Imaging Mass Cytometry Data Acquisition
author: Michelle Daniel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bf2ijqce
materials: 1. Attach the flat-bed scanner to a computer.
Under “Data acquisition” create a new Empty12AF file.

steps.instruction: 1. Use the flat-bed scanner with the custom sample holder and load up to 12 slides to be acquired. 2. Scan the slides to .jpg at a resolution of 600 dpi and save the image. The low resolution overview scanning of each slide can be performed on any computer.

steps.title: Make sure that the autofocus pins...
steps.instruction: Make sure that the autofocus pins in the software are not located above the hydrophobic marker pen. This may lead to the creation of a false focal plane image of the slide and result in decreased ablation efficiency.

steps.title: Save the mcd file in the...
steps.instruction: Save the mcd file in the data drive (“E”) as a new folder.

steps.title: Create panorama images of the tissue samples. Note
steps.instruction: Create panorama images of the tissue samples. Note: Panoramas should not be larger than 10’000 x 10’000 pixels. This requires a running, fully tuned IMC.

steps.title: Locate the areas of interest identified...
steps.instruction: Locate the areas of interest identified in IHC staining in the panorama.

steps.title: Set up an ROI for the...
steps.instruction: Set up an ROI for the region(s) of interest with a defined area(s) (e.g. 1000 x 1000 pixels).

steps.title: In AirLab download the relevant panel...
steps.instruction: In AirLab download the relevant panel (in options select “for CyTOF 2”). Save it to the folder where the mcd file is located.

steps.title: Select all ROIs and under “Template”...
steps.instruction: Select all ROIs and under “Template” import the panel downloaded from AirLab.Scroll to the bottom of the list and select the imported panel. In the panel selection pane, set the ablation energy to 2.5 dB and the Ablation Frequency to 400 Hz.

steps.title: Double check that the right template...
steps.instruction: Double check that the right template was selected and that Ir191 and Ir193 are included.

steps.title: Set the DV Opt parameter to 4 h
steps.instruction: Set the DV Opt parameter to 4 h.

steps.title: Hit start
steps.instruction: Hit start. (1 mm2 at 400 Hz should roughly take 1h). Once the panel has been downloaded from AirLab and added to the first acquisition it is available in the IMC software. It will then not be necessary to repeat this step afterwards and it will also not be necessary to save the panel.conf to every single folder that is created for each slideID.
